##NAMES=Pezzottaite
##RRUFFID=R060583
##IDEAL CHEMISTRY=CsLiBe_2_Al_2_Si_6_O_18_
##LOCALITY=Ambatovita, Mandrosonoro area, Fianarantsoa Province, Madagascar
##OWNER=RRUFF
##SOURCE=Michael Scott
##DESCRIPTION=Pink thin tabular hexagonal plate
##STATUS=The identification of this mineral has been confirmed by X-ray diffraction and chemical analysis
##URL=https://www.rruff.net/odr/rruff_sample/R060583
##MEASURED CHEMISTRY=(Cs_0.74_Na_0.10_Rb_0.03_Ca_0.03_K_0.02_)_Σ0.92_Li_1.08_Be_2_Al_2.05_Si_5.96_O_18_.   BeO and Li_2_O were added.
##DIFFRACTION SAMPLE DESCRIPTION=Powder
##CELL PARAMETERS=a: 15.9636 b: 15.9636 c: 27.8455 alpha: 90 beta: 90 gamma: 120 volume: 6145.4 crystal system: hexagonal
##FILETYPE=Raman RAW
##RAMAN WAVELENGTH=780
